offline.title: Offline
offline.banner: You can still use this app. Reports are saved on this device.

category.title: Select a category
category.subtitle: Choose the type of issue or service you need.
category.helper: Select one option below, then continue to the next step.

details.title: Request details
details.subtitle: Provide a brief description of your request.
details.helper: Fields marked below are required to continue. Optional photos may help staff respond faster.
details.descriptionHelper: Write clearly in everyday language. You may type or use voice input.

images.title: Photos (optional)
images.hint: Add up to 3 images showing the issue or location.

voice.title: Voice input
voice.hint: Tap the microphone and speak. Your words will appear in the description field.
voice.unsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.

errors.permission: Microphone access was denied. Allow microphone permission and try again.
errors.generic: Voice input could not start. Please try again or type your description.
errors.unsupported: Voice input is not available in this browser.

confirmation.title: Request submitted
confirmation.subtitle: Thank you. Your request has been received.
confirmation.referenceHint: Keep this number for your records.

maintenance.label: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Roads, lighting, parks, and public infrastructure.

utilities.label: Utilities
utilities.description: Water supply, power outages, and meter issues.

permits.label: Permits & licenses
permits.description: Building permits, business licenses, and registrations.
